$schema-note: Reproducibility manifest for one unit's art. Copy this file to art/units/<unit>/manifest.json and fill it in. Its purpose: any frame can be regenerated identically later, and the dataset is self-documenting for AI training. See docs/art-generation.md.

generation.styleFragment: flat 2D game sprite, top-down 3/4 view, clean cel shading, bold readable silhouette, limited palette, cute cartoonish character, single character centered on transparent background, no ground shadow, consistent line weight
generation.unitPrompt: FILL_IN — the unit-specific description appended to the style fragment

handEditing: FILL_IN — describe any manual cleanup/compositing done. (Relevant both for reproducibility and because meaningful human editing is what can make the assembled sprite sheet copyrightable, if that is ever wanted.)
deployedTo: UnityRTS/RTS/Assets/... (path where the finished sheet is imported into Unity)
